{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Warehouse Officer",
  "description": "Agary pharmaceutical limited, was established in 1992 as a national and regional marketing company that specializes in the importation and distribution of medical and hospital consumables. When marketing our product we provide a wide range of services to our distributors. From small business to big conglomorates, Agary pharmaceutical Ltd works round the clock to bring our clients imaginations to life and move them forward. For close to two decades, Agary pharmacetical Ltd has worked with a wide array of customers and consultants in numerous fields and specialization, we pride ourselves as number one in hospital consumables. Our diverse client roster has resulted in a flexible big-picture view of the Pharmaceutical industry that many client and consumers overlook by seeking our niche markets. We have a wide range of experience working in the pharmaceutical industry, we specialize in hospital consumables.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Officer

Job Location: Deidei, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Warehouse Officer to manage day-to-day warehouse operations, ensuring the efficient receipt, storage, and dispatch of goods.
	The role involves inspecting and recording incoming items, organizing stock in designated locations, and maintaining accurate inventory records. The Warehouse Officer will monitor stock levels through regular counts, prepare and dispatch orders promptly, and ensure all documentation such as GRNs, waybills, and stock records are properly maintained.
	The ideal candidate will ensure compliance with health and safety standards, maintain cleanliness and orderliness within the warehouse, and coordinate effectively with procurement, logistics, and other departments to support smooth operations.
	The role also requires identifying and reporting discrepancies, damages, or shortages, while ensuring overall accuracy, accountability, and efficiency in warehouse activities.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or related field
	2-4years of experience in warehouse or inventory management
	Good knowledge of inventory control systems and warehouse practices
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel)
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Attention to detail and accuracy
	Good communication and teamwork skills
	Experience with ERP or inventory management software is an advantage
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Resume to: careers@agarypharm.net using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Warehouse Officer Job at Agary Pharmaceutical Limited




        
    

        
        
     

            
    

Agary pharmaceutical limited, was established in 1992 as a national and regional marketing company that specializes in the importation and distribution of medical and hospital consumables. When marketing our product we provide a wide range of services to our distributors. From small business to big conglomorates, Agary pharmaceutical Ltd works round the clock to bring our clients imaginations to life and move them forward. For close to two decades, Agary pharmacetical Ltd has worked with a wide array of customers and consultants in numerous fields and specialization, we pride ourselves as number one in hospital consumables. Our diverse client roster has resulted in a flexible big-picture view of the Pharmaceutical industry that many client and consumers overlook by seeking our niche markets. We have a wide range of experience working in the pharmaceutical industry, we specialize in hospital consumables.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Officer

Job Location: Deidei, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Warehouse Officer to manage day-to-day warehouse operations, ensuring the efficient receipt, storage, and dispatch of goods.
	The role involves inspecting and recording incoming items, organizing stock in designated locations, and maintaining accurate inventory records. The Warehouse Officer will monitor stock levels through regular counts, prepare and dispatch orders promptly, and ensure all documentation such as GRNs, waybills, and stock records are properly maintained.
	The ideal candidate will ensure compliance with health and safety standards, maintain cleanliness and orderliness within the warehouse, and coordinate effectively with procurement, logistics, and other departments to support smooth operations.
	The role also requires identifying and reporting discrepancies, damages, or shortages, while ensuring overall accuracy, accountability, and efficiency in warehouse activities.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or related field
	2-4years of experience in warehouse or inventory management
	Good knowledge of inventory control systems and warehouse practices
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel)
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Attention to detail and accuracy
	Good communication and teamwork skills
	Experience with ERP or inventory management software is an advantage
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Executive",
  "description": "Accretio Africa - Our client is a fast-growing lift and elevator franchise delivering innovative mobility solutions across Nigeria.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	We&rsquo;re looking for an energetic and results-oriented Sales Executive to drive customer acquisition, build client relationships, and convert opportunities into business growth.
	Generate leads, conduct client meetings, present solutions, manage proposals, and drive conversions.


What You&rsquo;ll Do


	Generate and qualify leads through networking, referrals, research, and outreach.
	Conduct client meetings, presentations, and product demonstrations.
	Understand customer requirements and recommend suitable solutions.
	Prepare quotations, proposals, and maintain an active sales pipeline.
	Achieve sales targets while working closely with internal teams to ensure customer satisfaction.


Who You Are


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field.
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in Sales, Business Development, or Customer Acquisition.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
	Proven ability to identify opportunities and close deals.
	Proficient in CRM tools and Microsoft Office Suite.


Why Join?


	Attractive salary (N200,000 &ndash; N400,000 monthly) and commission opportunities.
	Exposure to diverse clients and projects.
	Career growth and continuous learning opportunities.
	Dynamic and high-performance work environment.

Sales Executive Job at Accretio Africa




        
    

        
        Accretio Africa - Our client is a fast-growing lift and elevator franchise delivering innovative mobility solutions across Nigeria.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	We’re looking for an energetic and results-oriented Sales Executive to drive customer acquisition, build client relationships, and convert opportunities into business growth.
	Generate leads, conduct client meetings, present solutions, manage proposals, and drive conversions.


What You’ll Do
     

            
    




	Generate and qualify leads through networking, referrals, research, and outreach.
	Conduct client meetings, presentations, and product demonstrations.
	Understand customer requirements and recommend suitable solutions.
	Prepare quotations, proposals, and maintain an active sales pipeline.
	Achieve sales targets while working closely with internal teams to ensure customer satisfaction.


Who You Are


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field.
	2–4 years of experience in Sales, Business Development, or Customer Acquisition.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
	Proven ability to identify opportunities and close deals.
	Proficient in CRM tools and Microsoft Office Suite.


Why Join?


	Attractive salary (N200,000 – N400,000 monthly) and commission opportunities.
	Exposure to diverse clients and projects.
	Career growth and continuous learning opportunities.
	Dynamic and high-performance work environment.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Executive Assistant Job at Accretio Africa




        
    

        
        Accretio Africa, an HR Consulting Firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode - Hybrid (3 days onsite)

Job Summary


	Are you highly organized, tech-savvy, and great at keeping things on track? We're looking for an Executive Assistant to support a busy Interior Designer with project coordination, scheduling, research, and day-to-day operations.


What You'll Do
     

            
    




	Manage calendars, meetings, and communications.
	Coordinate with clients, vendors, and contractors.
	Keep project files, documents, and records organized.
	Conduct research and source materials for projects.
	Support project execution and attend meetings or site visits when required.
	Learn and adapt quickly to new tools and systems.


What We're Looking For


	Strong experience with Notion and task management tools.
	Highly tech-savvy and able to pick up new software quickly.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially PowerPoint) and Canva.
	Excellent organizational, communication, and follow-up skills.
	Detail-oriented, proactive, and able to work independently.
	Professional, calm, and confident in dealing with clients and stakeholders.
	If you're someone who enjoys bringing structure to fast-paced environments and loves getting things done, we'd love to hear from you.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Analyst",
  "description": "RAY Oil and Gas has been delivering sustainable growth in the last ten years while building a solid business foundation amidst a challenging operating environment. Our mission is to extend this trajectory into the future and turn RAY Oil and gas into a leading company in the Oil Service industry, both domestically and internationally. We continue to face new challenges in our business environment, the pace and scale of changes are unprecedented. In order to overcome these challenges, we have undergone an organizational transformation that includes initiatives such as enhancing local capabilities and technology. These improvements have enabled us to identify and address rapid shifts in the Oil and Gas landscape. But there is more to be done, and we remain fully committed to strengthening our capabilities with focus on HSE and service Quality as key drivers for our success and business continuity. We foster an environment of employee recognition, respect, personnel development and camaraderie while striving to achieve a healthy work-life balance. This is our Company culture, a culture we shall pass on to the next generation of leaders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Analyst

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are hiring a Business Analyst to join our project team. You will work alongside other business analysts and report directly to the project manager.


Responsibilities


	Evaluating business processes, anticipating requirements, uncovering areas for improvement, and developing and implementing solutions.
	Leading ongoing reviews of business processes and developing optimization strategies.
	Staying up-to-date on the latest process and IT advancements to automate and modernize systems.
	Conducting meetings and presentations to share ideas and findings.
	Performing requirements analysis.
	Documenting and communicating the results of your efforts.
	Effectively communicating your insights and plans to cross-functional team members and management.
	Gathering critical information from meetings with various stakeholders and producing useful reports.
	Working closely with clients, technicians, and managerial staff.
	Providing leadership, training, coaching, and guidance to junior staff.
	Allocating resources and maintaining cost efficiency.
	Ensuring solutions meet business needs and requirements.
	Performing user acceptance testing.
	Managing projects, developing project plans, and monitoring performance.
	Updating, implementing, and maintaining procedures.
	Prioritizing initiatives based on business needs and requirements.
	Serving as a liaison between stakeholders and users.
	Managing competing resources and priorities.
	Monitoring deliverables and ensuring timely completion of projects.


Requirements


	A Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business or related field or an MBA with 2 years of experience.
	Exceptional analytical and conceptual thinking skills.
	The ability to influence stakeholders and work closely with them to determine acceptable solutions.
	Advanced technical skills.
	Excellent documentation skills.
	Fundamental analytical and conceptual thinking skills.
	Experience creating detailed reports and giving presentations.
	Competency in Microsoft applications including Word, Excel, and Outlook.
	A track record of following through on commitments.
	Excellent planning, organizational, and time management skills.
	Experience leading and developing top-performing teams.
	A history of leading and supporting successful projects.


Salary
N2,400,000 - N6,000,000 / Annum.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: rayoilandgaslimited@gmail.com using the Job Title as the subject of the email.
Or
Click here to apply online

Note: Double Applications would be disqualified.",

Business Analyst Job at RAY Oil and Gas




        
    

        
        
     

            
    

RAY Oil and Gas has been delivering sustainable growth in the last ten years while building a solid business foundation amidst a challenging operating environment. Our mission is to extend this trajectory into the future and turn RAY Oil and gas into a leading company in the Oil Service industry, both domestically and internationally. We continue to face new challenges in our business environment, the pace and scale of changes are unprecedented. In order to overcome these challenges, we have undergone an organizational transformation that includes initiatives such as enhancing local capabilities and technology. These improvements have enabled us to identify and address rapid shifts in the Oil and Gas landscape. But there is more to be done, and we remain fully committed to strengthening our capabilities with focus on HSE and service Quality as key drivers for our success and business continuity. We foster an environment of employee recognition, respect, personnel development and camaraderie while striving to achieve a healthy work-life balance. This is our Company culture, a culture we shall pass on to the next generation of leaders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Analyst

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are hiring a Business Analyst to join our project team. You will work alongside other business analysts and report directly to the project manager.


Responsibilities


	Evaluating business processes, anticipating requirements, uncovering areas for improvement, and developing and implementing solutions.
	Leading ongoing reviews of business processes and developing optimization strategies.
	Staying up-to-date on the latest process and IT advancements to automate and modernize systems.
	Conducting meetings and presentations to share ideas and findings.
	Performing requirements analysis.
	Documenting and communicating the results of your efforts.
	Effectively communicating your insights and plans to cross-functional team members and management.
	Gathering critical information from meetings with various stakeholders and producing useful reports.
	Working closely with clients, technicians, and managerial staff.
	Providing leadership, training, coaching, and guidance to junior staff.
	Allocating resources and maintaining cost efficiency.
	Ensuring solutions meet business needs and requirements.
	Performing user acceptance testing.
	Managing projects, developing project plans, and monitoring performance.
	Updating, implementing, and maintaining procedures.
	Prioritizing initiatives based on business needs and requirements.
	Serving as a liaison between stakeholders and users.
	Managing competing resources and priorities.
	Monitoring deliverables and ensuring timely completion of projects.


Requirements


	A Bachelor’s Degree in Business or related field or an MBA with 2 years of experience.
	Exceptional analytical and conceptual thinking skills.
	The ability to influence stakeholders and work closely with them to determine acceptable solutions.
	Advanced technical skills.
	Excellent documentation skills.
	Fundamental analytical and conceptual thinking skills.
	Experience creating detailed reports and giving presentations.
	Competency in Microsoft applications including Word, Excel, and Outlook.
	A track record of following through on commitments.
	Excellent planning, organizational, and time management skills.
	Experience leading and developing top-performing teams.
	A history of leading and supporting successful projects.


Salary
N2,400,000 - N6,000,000 / Annum. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Title as the subject of the email.
Or
Click here to apply online

Note: Double Applications would be    

    

        Click here to Apply
